# Finance & HR — Prompts

Prompt collection for **Finance & HR**.

| Title | App | Use Case | Difficulty |
| ----- | --- | -------- | ---------- |
| [Audit Support Research](../../_canonical/audit-support-research.md) | Cross-App | Gather context for audit preparation. Formal audit evidence must come from financial systems. | intermediate |
| [Budget Variance Explanation Draft](../../_canonical/budget-variance-explanation-draft.md) | Cross-App | Draft variance explanations based on team discussions. Numbers must come from financial systems. | intermediate |
| [Dashboard Feedback Summary](../../_canonical/dashboard-feedback-summary.md) | Outlook | Gather user feedback on dashboards and reports to prioritize improvements. | intermediate |
| [Data Definition Research](../../_canonical/data-definition-research.md) | Cross-App | Research metric definitions across the organization to ensure consistency. | intermediate |
| [Data Quality Issue Research](../../_canonical/data-quality-issue-research.md) | Cross-App | Research data quality issues from communications to support improvement initiatives. | intermediate |
| [Engagement Theme Analysis](../../_canonical/engagement-theme-analysis.md) | Cross-App | Identify engagement themes from informal feedback. Always supplement with formal surveys. | intermediate |
| [Financial Review Preparation](../../_canonical/financial-review-preparation.md) | Cross-App | Enter financial reviews prepared with context on all recent discussions and concerns. | intermediate |
| [FinOps Cloud Cost Discussion Search](../../_canonical/finops-cloud-cost-discussion-search.md) | Cross-App | Gather context on cloud cost discussions to prepare for FinOps reviews. Cost data comes from cloud platforms. | intermediate |
| [Governance Communication Draft](../../_canonical/governance-communication-draft.md) | Cross-App | Draft data governance communications while maintaining consistent organizational tone. | intermediate |
| [Internal Announcement Draft](../../_canonical/internal-announcement-draft.md) | Cross-App | Draft internal announcements quickly while ensuring appropriate tone and completeness. | intermediate |
| [Internal Comms Feedback Summary](../../_canonical/internal-comms-feedback-summary.md) | Outlook | Gather feedback on internal communications to improve future messaging. | intermediate |
| [Month-End Discussion Summary](../../_canonical/month-end-discussion-summary.md) | Cross-App | Prepare for month-end close meetings with context on all issues discussed. Close activities use ERP systems. | intermediate |
| [Onboarding Checklist Research](../../_canonical/onboarding-checklist-research.md) | Cross-App | Compile existing onboarding materials to create comprehensive new hire packages. | intermediate |
| [Policy Research](../../_canonical/policy-research.md) | Cross-App | Quickly find relevant HR policies to answer employee inquiries. Always verify currency of policies. | intermediate |
| [Requirements Gathering Summary](../../_canonical/requirements-gathering-summary.md) | Cross-App | Consolidate stakeholder requirements for data products from scattered communications. | intermediate |
| [Self-Service Analytics Support Research](../../_canonical/self-service-analytics-support-research.md) | Cross-App | Identify common user struggles with self-service analytics to improve support and training. | intermediate |
| [Training Program Summary](../../_canonical/training-program-summary.md) | Cross-App | Gather training program context and feedback for program planning and improvement. | intermediate |
